articles.title: NBA legend James claims another scoring record
articles.original_title: NBA legend James claims another scoring record
articles.summary: LeBron James surpasses Kareem Abdul-Jabbar for the most field goals in NBA history as the Los Angeles Lakers lose at the Denver Nuggets.

articles.title: Luka Doncic one technical foul away from an automatic suspension
articles.original_title: Luka Doncic one technical foul away from an automatic suspension
articles.summary: Luka Doncic received his 15th technical foul of the season in the Lakers' loss to the Nuggets, putting him one technical away from a one-game suspension.

articles.title: LeBron bests Kareem for most made FG in history
articles.original_title: LeBron bests Kareem for most made FG in history
articles.summary: LeBron James made the 15,838th FG of his career on Thursday night, passing Kareem Abdul-Jabbar for the most made field goals in NBA history.

articles.title: Despite rust, Young dazzles Wiz crowd in debut
articles.original_title: Despite rust, Young dazzles Wiz crowd in debut
articles.summary: In his limited time on the court, Trae Young proved in his Wizards debut that he's the type of player the team hasn't had since John Wall, thrilling the D.C. crowd and finishing with 12 points in a 122-112 loss to the Jazz.

articles.title: Sources: Celtics' Tatum expected to return Fri.
articles.original_title: Sources: Celtics' Tatum expected to return Fri.
articles.summary: Celtics superstar Jayson Tatum is expected to make his 2025-26 NBA season debut against the Dallas Mavericks on Friday night at TD Garden, sources told ESPN.

articles.title: Flagg return from injury spoiled by late Magic rally
articles.original_title: Flagg return from injury spoiled by late Magic rally
articles.summary: Cooper Flagg returned to the Dallas Mavericks' lineup Thursday night after missing eight games because of a left midfoot sprain and had 18 points and six assists in a 115-114 loss to the Orlando Magic.

articles.title: Ayton injures knee; LeBron (elbow) iffy for Friday
articles.original_title: Ayton injures knee; LeBron (elbow) iffy for Friday
articles.summary: Deandre Ayton left Thursday night's loss to the Nuggets with a knee injury, and LeBron James complained of a sore elbow afterward and wasn't sure of his status for Friday's game against the Pacers.

articles.title: Dubs surprise in OT as Curry says, 'Keep going'
articles.original_title: Dubs surprise in OT as Curry says, 'Keep going'
articles.summary: In the hours leading up to the Warriors' overtime win in Houston on Thursday night, their absent superstar, Stephen Curry, sent their remaining big name, Draymond Green, a text message of encouragement.

articles.title: Judge rules Beasley owes $1M to former agency
articles.original_title: Judge rules Beasley owes $1M to former agency
articles.summary: A federal judge in New York issued a $1 million civil judgment against NBA free agent Malik Beasley on Thursday in a contract dispute with his former agency.

articles.title: Pistons lose Thompson (ankle) in loss to Spurs
articles.original_title: Pistons lose Thompson (ankle) in loss to Spurs
articles.summary: Pistons forward Ausar Thompson left Thursday's loss to the Spurs in the first quarter and didn't return because of a sprained right ankle.
